TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chad_Allen_(actor), title = Chad_Allen_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chad_Allen_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Chad Allen kawas tay 1974, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 6, Chad Allen , squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Chad Allen kawas tay 1974, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 6, Chad Allen , squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħa* allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħa* allen , s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
